---
title: "Public engagement"
---

My research engages with public and policy debates on migration, asylum, and European integration. This page collects my policy papers and outreach publications. For a detailed list of public contributions, see my [CV](cv.qmd).

For media requests, public talks, or advisory work, please [email me](mailto:p.lutz@vu.nl).

## Policy papers

- Trauner, F., **Lutz, P.**, & Stutz, P. (November 2025) [*Towards a fairer EU asylum policy: Lessons from the Dublin system for the EU's Solidarity Mechanism*](https://www.epc.eu/publication/towards-a-fairer-eu-asylum-policy-lessons-from-the-dublin-system-for-the-eus-solidarity-mechanism/). Discussion Paper. Brussels: European Policy Centre.

- Bachelet, M. & **Lutz, P.** (August 2025) [*Europe's divide on immigration: Making responsibility-sharing work*](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/wp_live14/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/Policy-Brief-nccr-on-the-move-26-EN-Web.pdf). Policy Brief in a Nutshell 26. Neuchâtel: nccr on the move. Also available in [French](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/wp_live14/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/Policy-Brief-nccr-on-the-move-26-FR-Web.pdf) and [German](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/wp_live14/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/Policy-Brief-nccr-on-the-move-26-DE-Web.pdf).

- Herrmann, M., Zogg, P., & **Lutz, P.** (February 2025) [*Analyse des Algorithmus und seiner Nutzung zur Verteilung der Asylsuchenden auf die Kantone*](https://www.parlament.ch/centers/documents/_layouts/15/DocIdRedir.aspx?ID=DOCID-1-12618). Report for the Swiss Parliamentary Administrative Control. Ostermundigen: PrivatePublicConsulting. [In German]

- **Lutz, P.**, Solenthaler, N., & Sutter, N. (October 2020) [*Die Zirkulär-Bewilligung: Das brachliegende Potenzial der Drittstaatenmigration*](https://www.foraus.ch/publications/die-zirkulaer-bewilligung/). foraus policy brief. Zurich. [In German]

- Brantschen, S., **Lutz, P.**, Portmann, L., Faoro, N., & Wäspi, F. (February 2019) [*Swiss Refugee Partnership: Eine neue Zulassungspolitik im Schweizer Asylwesen*](https://www.foraus.ch/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/foraus_Swiss-Refugee-Partnership.pdf). foraus Discussion Paper No. 38. Zurich/Geneva. [Summary in [AsylNews](https://t.co/PZ0jPkqgsT?amp=1), No. 3, September 2019]

- **Lutz, P.**, Kaufmann, D., Stünzi, A., & Egli, S. (2017) [*Prisoners of the Dublin Dilemma: How to reform the Common European Asylum System?*](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/321915814_Prisoners_of_the_Dublin_Dilemma_How_to_reform_the_Common_European_Asylum_System) foraus Discussion Paper No. 32. Zurich/Geneva. [German version: [*Gefangen im Dublin-Dilemma*](https://www.foraus.ch/wp-content/uploads/2016/12/foraus_Diskussionspapier-Dublin.pdf), December 2016]

- Kaufmann, D. & **Lutz, P.** (February 2015) [*Gefangen im Nullsummenspiel: Eine Bewertung der MEI-Umsetzungsvorschläge*](https://www.foraus.ch/wp-content/uploads/2015/02/foraus-Gefangen-Im-Nullsummenspiel.pdf). foraus Discussion Paper No. 23. Zurich/Geneva. [In German]

## Short articles & blog posts

- **Lutz, P.** & Bachelet, M. (2026) [*Soll sich die Schweiz am EU-Solidaritätsmechanismus in der Asylpolitik beteiligen?*](https://www.defacto.expert/2026/05/18/soll-sich-die-schweiz-am-eu-solidaritaetsmechanismus-in-der-asylpolitik-beteiligen/) *DeFacto*. (Also available in [*French*](https://www.defacto.expert/2026/05/18/la-suisse-doit-elle-participer-au-mecanisme-de-solidarite-du-pacte-de-lue-sur-la-migration-et-lasile/?lang=fr).)

- **Lutz, P.**, Trauner, F, & Stutz, P. (2026) [*The EU's Dublin system is widely seen as unfair - but official statistics tell a different story*](https://blogs.lse.ac.uk/europpblog/2026/05/15/eu-dublin-system-asylum-fairness-statistics/) LSE European Politics Blog.

- **Lutz, P.** & Bachelet, M. (2026) [*The new pact on migration and asylum: Political developments and implications for European responsibility-sharing.*](https://asyl.recht.ch/de/artikel/02asyl0126abh/new-pact-migration-and-asylum-political-developments-and-implications) *ASYL*, 01/2026: 8–14.

- **Lutz, P.** & Bitschnau, M. (2026) [*Why we need to rethink what we know about public views on immigration.*](https://theloop.ecpr.eu/why-we-need-to-rethink-what-we-know-about-public-views-on-immigration/) *The Loop* (ECPR), 20 January.

- Manser-Egli, S. & **Lutz, P.** (2025) [*Integration dispensation: Why immigrants face stronger social norms.*](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/blog/integration-dispensation-why-immigrants-face-stronger-social-norms/) Blog post *nccr on the move*, 3 November. (Reposts on *DeFacto* and *Sociale Vraagstukken*.)

- **Lutz, P.** (2025) [*Niederlassung statt Mobilität: Der Fehlanreiz restriktiver Einwanderungspolitik.*](https://issuu.com/pomona.media/docs/terra_cognita_41_bf?fr=xKAE9_zU1NQ), Terra cognita - Schweizer Zeitschrift zu Integration und Migration. Migration und Mobilität weiterdenken: Perspektiven aus der Forschung, Ausgabe 41.

- Rausis, F., Bachelet, M., & **Lutz, P.** (2024) [*UN refugee agencies: Vulnerable funding structures and a looming legitimacy crisis.*](https://www.fmreview.org/financing-displacement-response/rausis-bachelet-lutz/) *Forced Migration Review*, 74.

- **Lutz, P.** & Lavenex, S. (2024) [*Switzerland comes to terms with being a country of immigration.*](https://www.migrationpolicy.org/article/switzerland-immigration-politics-policy) *Migration Information Source*, Migration Policy Institute, 18 September.

- Bachelet, M. & **Lutz, P.** (2024) [*A new pact on migration and asylum: What changes for responsibility-sharing in the European Union?*](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/blog/a-new-pact-on-migration-and-asylum-what-changes-for-responsibility-sharing-in-the-european-union/) Blog post *nccr on the move*, 28 February.

- Lavenex, S, Hoffmeyer-Zlotnik, P. & **Lutz, P.** (2023) [*What have trade agreements to do with migration policy? (https://migrationpolicycentre.eu/what-do-trade-agreements-have-to-do-with-migration-policy/) Blog post Migration Policy Center (European University Institute)

- **Lutz, P.** (2021) [*How the 2015 migration crisis shaped the bordering preferences of EU citizens.*](https://blogs.lse.ac.uk/europpblog/2021/02/25/how-the-2015-migration-crisis-shaped-the-bordering-preferences-of-eu-citizens/) *LSE EUROPP*, 25 February.

- **Lutz, P.** (2020) [*Personenfreizügigkeit in der Krise?*](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/blog/personenfreizugigkeit-in-der-krise/) Blog post nccr on the move. Repost on DeFacto & [*Public talk*](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z-h9GWsWPJs)

- **Lutz, P.** & Bitschnau, M. (2020) [*Why most people are wrong about immigration*](https://www.routedmagazine.com/omc2020-2-people-wrong-migration) Article in Routed Migration and (Im)mobility Magazine.

- Stünzi, A., Kaufmann, D., **Lutz, P.** & Manser-Egli, S. (2019) [*SWie kann die europäische Asylpolitik reformiert werden?*](https://www.terra-cognita.ch/fileadmin/user_upload/terracognita/documents/Terra_Cognita_35-19.pdf) Terra cognita - Schweizer Zeitschrift zu Integration und Migration: Asylpolitische Perspektiven, Ausgabe 35.

- **Lutz, P.** & Manser-Egli, S. (2019) [*Schengen-Dublin als öffentliches Gut eines integrierten Europas(https://nccr-onthemove.ch/blog/schengen-dublin-als-offentliches-gut-eines-integrierten-europas/) Blog post nccr on the move, 17.Mai 2019.

- **Lutz, P.** (2017) [*Warum Heimat nach Gestaltung statt Konservierung verlangt*](https://www.philosophie.ch/2017-06-28-lutz) (Blog post philosophie.ch, 28.Juni 2017).

- **Lutz, P.** (2017) [*Wie Migranten Muslime wurden*](https://www.haus-der-religionen.ch/file/repository/SAGW_Bulletin_2_17_web_Einzelseiten.pdf) Islam in der Schweiz, Bulletin der Schweizerischen Akademie der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaften 2/2017.
